name: codex-ads
description: A Codex skill bundle for paid advertising audits, UAC Quick Decisions and experiments, planning, creative review, attribution, and reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Paid advertising audit, ops, reporting, creative, and KPI diagnosis skills.
interface.longDescription: Codex Ads routes paid media work into focused sub-skills for audits, UAC Quick Decisions and experiment loops, daily ops, reports, creative review, tracking checks, planning, and KPI diagnosis.
defaultPrompt: 只读看一下这个广告账户，指出今天要处理什么。
按甲方模板生成今日广告日报。
诊断安装很多但付费很少的问题。
我现在跑 AC2.5，支付价值量不多，直接告诉我该继续、并行 AC3.0 还是等待。
